title: Create: Rustic Structures
description: This mod adds functional and decorative structures using Create blocks.
body:
![Create: Rustic Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lmbZMkEZ/images/9a21b62a799d320f623ee59aa7add051f4013a00.png)

About

This mod is an addon for Create that adds rustic and medieval-style structures using Create blocks.

Current structures

Rustic Well [common]
Rustic Windmill [uncommon]
Rustic Smithy [uncommon]
Rustic Barn [rare]

Rustic Well and Rustic Smithy can be found in forest-type biomes, while Rustic Windmill and Rustic Barn generate in meadow and plains-type biomes.

Screenshots

Compatibility

✅ Biomes O' Plenty
✅ Oh The Biomes We've Gone
✅ Terralith
✅ Tectonic

Other world generation mods should also be compatible but require further testing.

Disclaimer: This mod uses exclusively vanilla, data-based world gen features. I am not responsible for occasional Minecraft world generation glitches. Please report any issues to Mojang instead.

Dependencies

This mod requires Create.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
